# Psalms 6

## Verses (10)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O Lord, do not be bitter with me in your wrath; do not send punishment on me in the heat of your passion. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I am wasted away: make me well, for even my bones are troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | My soul is in bitter trouble; and you, O Lord, how long? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Come back, O Lord, make my soul free; O give me salvation because of your mercy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For in death there is no memory of you; in the underworld who will give you praise? | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The voice of my sorrow is a weariness to me; all the night I make my bed wet with weeping; it is watered by the drops flowing from my eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | My eyes are wasting away with trouble; they are becoming old because of all those who are against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Go from me, all you workers of evil; for the Lord has given ear to the voice of my weeping. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | The Lord has given ear to my request; the Lord has let my prayer come before him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Let all those who are against me be shamed and deeply troubled; let them be turned back and suddenly put to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
